creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
Upgrade of pilot-link port from 0.9.1 to 0.9.2

Fix: 

Trivial:

	    Change in Makefile the two lines

		DISTNAME=       pilot-link.0.9.1
		PKGNAME=        pilot-link-0.9.1

	    to

		DISTNAME=       pilot-link.0.9.2
		PKGNAME=        pilot-link-0.9.2
How-To-Repeat: 
	-
